title: Aye — Delegate Browser Work
excerpt: Aye is a general-purpose AI browser that plans, acts, and verifies results on real websites, now available for Mac and Windows.
content_html:
Now available for Mac and Windows

Download. Reply. Maintain.Delegate browser chores to Aye.

Save videos you can access on X, Telegram, and Reddit. Handle routine support emails and keep social channels moving. Aye completes repetitive work for you inside real websites.

Start free · Built on Chromium · You approve critical actions

Competitor research

aye://task/research

A

Project tools · 2026

Choosing the right
workspace for your team.

Linear1

Notion2

Asana3

ClickUp4

What Aye can do today

Not a concept. Work you can already delegate.

From a native download action to a scheduled Skill, Aye turns media, inbox, and social operations into visible, reusable browser workflows.

01

Media Downloader

Save video from X, Telegram, and Reddit

Discover and save video from pages you can normally access. Telegram Web also provides media-level download controls.

02

MSupport emailGmail

●

Playback history will not sync2 min ago

Preparing a reply

↗

✓Sent

Inbox Assistant

Give routine support email an owner

Review visible support messages, understand their context and language, write a natural reply, and continue through the bounded inbox task.

03

Social Operator

Keep your social channels moving

Reply to communities, handle notifications, filter spam, and prepare content for Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, WeChat, and X.

From one task to ongoing automation

Do it once. Save it. Run it on schedule.

01

Run it now

Describe the task directly, or use built-in actions to download, read, reply, and more.

02

Save as a Skill

Save a proven workflow so you do not have to explain it again next time.

03

Schedule it

Choose daily, weekly, or fixed intervals to keep routine work moving on schedule.

Real workflows

Your media, inbox, and communities all live in the browser.

↗

Video and media downloads

Save videos you can access from X, Telegram, and Reddit, with download progress in one place.

✦

Support email replies

Handle in-scope Gmail support messages and reply naturally in English or Chinese based on context.

✓

Daily community maintenance

Handle replies, notifications, and spam across Reddit, Tieba, Xiaohongshu, and X.

↻

Multi-platform content preparation

Prepare platform-native drafts for Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, WeChat, and X, ready for your review before publishing.

You stay in control

Automation does not mean acting without permission.

Aye shows you what it is doing. It pauses for your input at sign-in, CAPTCHA, submission, payment, and other sensitive steps.

✓ You approve critical actions✓ You handle sign-in and CAPTCHA✓ Every task stays visible✓ Pause or stop at any time

!

Your approval is required

Submit this form?

Aye has completed and reviewed every field. Nothing will be submitted until you approve.

Frequently asked questions

What you may want to know before starting.

How is Aye different from a regular AI chat tool?＋

Aye does more than generate answers. It understands the current page, acts on real websites, verifies results, and completes multi-step tasks.

Can these workflows run automatically on a schedule?＋

Yes. Set a Prompt Skill or recorded Skill to run once, at intervals, daily, or weekly.

Which platforms does Aye support?＋

Aye is available from the Mac App Store and Microsoft Store for Mac and Windows.

Will Aye submit forms or make payments automatically?＋

Aye will not bypass your control. Submission, payment, and other high-risk actions require explicit approval, while sign-in and CAPTCHA are handed back to you.

Browse less.Get more done.

Download Aye and delegate your next browser task.
